<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Checking Tailwind sizes**

Confirming that Tailwind's text-4xl is 36px (2.25rem) to match our display-md size. 

**Adjusting typography tokens**

I'll add a new `watchlist-editorial-title` token at 36px to match Tailwind's text-4xl default. I'm adding a new `watchlist-title` token at 36px with Manrope font and tighter tracking to match the HTML text-4xl size. 

I'm mapping HTML text-4xl to 36px with Manrope font and tight tracking, noting that spacing tokens don't include 20px margin so I'll need to choose between adding a new token or using existing spacing + magic numbers. I'm using `spacing.lg + spacing.xs` (16+4=20px) for marginTop instead of adding a new token. I'm adjusting chip padding to match HTML values using `lg + xs` for horizontal and `sm` for vertical. I'm updating idle chip labels to use font-semibold with 600 weight to match selected chips. 

**Refining watchlist UI**

I'm refining the watchlist UI by adjusting chips spacing, padding, and title typography to match design specs. I'm adjusting collection label fonts to use fontWeight 700 and restructuring header margins to align title and chips properly. 

**Adjusting spacing**

I'm adding specific marginTop and padding values for chipsRow and chip elements. I'm adding opacity-20 class to ghost elements in recommendations section. I'm applying opacity-20 to the entire 'Popular Recommendations' section during ghost state for consistency with HTML. I'll ensure real recommendations match the placeholder visual style by maintaining 0.2 opacity for consistency. 

I'll implement opacity 0.2 for placeholder recommendations to match the watchlist_empty.png design. I'll adjust PosterPlaceholderGrid to use full opacity for ContentCards and opacity 0.2 for placeholders to match the HTML design. I'll adjust CTA button padding to 16px vertical and 32px horizontal with 12px border radius and 18px Manrope bold text. I'll update the CTA button to use 18px Manrope 700 text and fix the icon size to 96px. I'll use spacing.xxxxl + spacing.xxL + spacing.sm = 56+32+8 = 96 for the icon size. I'll use a subtle opacity approach for the border color with outline_variant at 0.1 opacity to match the HTML ring effect. 

I'll use background color with 10% opacity instead of border to comply with the no-line rule and match the subtle ring effect. I'll add a new color token `outline_variant_faint` with value `rgba(255,255,255,0.015)` to match the HTML ring effect. I'm adding a new color token `outline_variant_ring` with value `rgba(255,255,255,0.03)` for the HTML ring effect. 

I'm adding a new typography token `watchlist-cta` with 18px Manrope 700 for the empty watchlist CTA button. The HTML body inherits base 16px from Inter, while our count line uses label-sm 12px - need to align font sizes consistently. 

I'm adjusting the count line typography to Inter 14 font medium (`body-md` with `fontWeight: 500`) for consistency. I'm adding a new `watchlist-subline` token for the subline typography and adjusting the bookmark icon to use an outlined Material Symbol with fill 0 and opacity 50. The bookmark icon needs a new outlined path to match HTML's font-variation-settings with FILL 0 for empty state. I need to verify if `IconBookmarkOutlined` exists and check how `PATH_BOOKMARK` differs from Material's outlined version. 

**Adding typography tokens**

I'm adding typography tokens for watchlist screen title and CTA text. I'm adjusting header block spacing to remove large gaps between top and chips, using marginTop on chips only. 

**Adjusting spacing**

I'm removing the header block gap and using marginBottom on header titles for better spacing control. I'm implementing mb-2 spacing between labels and titles, with mt-5 for chip groups. I'm setting margin-bottom to `spacing.sm` on collection labels and removing header title gaps to achieve 8px spacing between labels and titles. I'm removing extra margin on screenTitle and setting chipsRow marginTop to spacing.lg + spacing.xs. I'm adjusting typography sizes and adding opacity transitions for loading states. I'm implementing opacity transitions for loading states, setting ghost blocks to 20% opacity including title and grid. 

I'm updating typography tokens and verifying grid card filtering behavior. I'm updating header spacing from `lg` to `xl` (24px) for consistent section margins. </details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Reviewing UI consistency**

I'm ensuring the UI matches the reference HTML by using ring instead of borderWidth for the outline variant ring. I confirmed the spacing and color variants match the reference HTML for chips, grids, and headers. </details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2)**_

Here is what was wrong and what we changed to follow `resources/watchlist.html` and `resources/watchlist-empty.html` (and your PNGs).

### Filter row (`WatchlistScreenHeader`)
- **Layout:** Chips sit in a **wrapping row** with **`gap-3` (12)** and **`mt-5` (20)** under the title, not spaced by the whole header block gap. `headerBlock` no longer adds a large gap before chips; **`chipsRow` uses `marginTop: spacing.lg + spacing.xs` (20)**.
- **Title:** **`text-4xl` / extrabold** → new token **`watchlist-screen-title`** (Manrope **36** / **800**, tight tracking) instead of **`display-md`** (40).
- **Eyebrow:** **`mb-2`** under “YOUR COLLECTION” → **`marginBottom: spacing.sm`** on the label; **`headerTitles`** no longer uses a generic vertical gap.
- **Chips:** **`px-5 py-2`** → **`paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg + spacing.xs` (20)**, **`paddingVertical: spacing.sm` (8)**. Labels use **`title-sm`** with **`fontWeight: '600'`** for both states, like **`font-semibold text-sm`**.
- **Section spacing:** Bottom spacing under the header block is **`spacing.xl` (24)** to align with **`mb-6`** before the grid.

### Empty watchlist (`WatchlistEmptyState` + CTA)
- **Bookmark size:** **`text-8xl`** (~96) → **`EMPTY_ICON_SIZE = spacing.xxxxl + spacing.xxl + spacing.sm`**.
- **Copy:** Body uses **`lineHeight: 24`** for the relaxed block like the HTML.
- **Disc ring:** **`ring-outline-variant/10`** → new color **`outline_variant_ring`** and **`borderColor`** on the disc (still a single soft ring, not a layout stroke).
- **Popular block:** While recommendations are **loading**, the block uses **`opacity: 0.2`** and **`pointerEvents: 'none'`**, like **`opacity-20 pointer-events-none`** on the ghost block.
- **“Popular Recommendations”:** Manrope + **`fontWeight: '500'`** for the section title (closer to the reference than bold 700).
- **Ghost tiles:** Corner radius **`rounded-lg` (~8)** → **`borderRadius: spacing.sm`** in **`GhostPosterPlaceholderGrid`** (was card-outer 16).

### Shared tokens / CTA
- **`typography.ts`:** **`watchlist-screen-title`**, **`watchlist-count-line`** (16 / **500** for “0 titles”), **`watchlist-cta-label`** (18 / **700** Manrope for the button).
- **`WatchlistScreenHeader`:** **`countLine`** uses **`watchlist-count-line`**.
- **`BrandSolidCtaButton`:** Label uses **`watchlist-cta-label`** (only used from the empty watchlist flow).

### Files touched
- `src/theme/typography.ts`
- `src/theme/colors.ts`
- `src/components/watchlist/WatchlistScreenHeader.tsx`
- `src/components/watchlist/WatchlistEmptyState.tsx`
- `src/components/common/BrandSolidCtaButton.tsx`
- `src/components/common/GhostPosterPlaceholderGrid.tsx`

`npx tsc --noEmit` passes. Jest `watchlistStore` passes (with `--watchman=false` in this environment).

**Note:** `watchlist-empty.html` does **not** include filter chips on the empty screen, so the empty route still hides chips (`showChips={false}`). If you want the same All / Movies / Series row when the list is empty (not in the HTML mock), say so and we can wire it up.

---

_**User**_

In see all screen only back icon should show not Home text , also the star icon color is not same as in other screen UI , make sure to create a common component for rating and star component and use it everywhere we are showing rating , also the star icon should be filled like in screen UI @resources/search.html fix the background color and opacity too, also don't show rating after year of relaese only year should shown after movie title 

---

Here is what was implemented.

### See All header
- In `src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx`, **`SeeAll`** now sets **`headerBackTitleVisible: false`**, so the stack only shows the back chevron (no **“Home”** back label on iOS).

### Shared poster rating UI
- Added **`src/components/common/PosterRatingBadge.tsx`**: TMDB guard, **`colors.poster_rating_scrim`** (`search.html`’s `bg-black/40`), **score then star**, **`hero-badge`** for the number, **`IconStar`** at **`primary_container`** (per `components.mdc`), with **`density`**: **`sm`** (10px star — Search grids) vs **`md`** (12px — `ContentCard` / watchlist grid).
- **`formatTmdbVoteAverageLabel`** lives in **`src/utils/tmdbDisplayGuards.ts`** next to **`showTmdbVoteAverageBadge`**; **`DetailChipsRow`** uses it for the same rounding rules.

### Filled star (everywhere `IconStar` is used)
- Replaced the old multi-path “outline” glyph with the official **Material Symbols Rounded `star_fill1_24px`** path in **`src/components/common/SimpleIcons.tsx`**, so detail chips and any other `IconStar` usage render **filled**.

### Wired `PosterRatingBadge` on posters
- **`ContentCard.tsx`**
- **`WatchlistGridCard.tsx`**
- **`SearchDefaultView.tsx`** (trending mini cards)
- **`SearchResultsStateView.tsx`** (result grid)

`Detail` / rails that only pass **`rating`** into **`ContentCard`** pick this up automatically.

### Subtitle: year only (no rating under title)
- **`formatListMovieSubtitle`** in **`src/utils/formatMovieListItem.ts`** now returns **only the release year** (or **—**), since the score is on the poster pill.
- **`SeeAllScreen`**, **`WatchlistEmptyState`**, and any other **`ContentCard`** + **`formatListMovieSubtitle`** usage get that behaviour.

### Tests
- **`__tests__/formatMovieListItem.test.ts`** — year-only expectations + missing date case.
- **`__tests__/tmdbDisplayGuards.test.ts`** — **`formatTmdbVoteAverageLabel`** cases.

**Note:** **`DetailChipsRow`** is still its own chip row (not a poster overlay); it keeps **`IconStar`** there but now uses the **filled** path and shared **`formatTmdbVoteAverageLabel`**. If you want that row to reuse **`PosterRatingBadge`** visually as well, we can align it in a follow-up.

---

I'm adjusting PosterRatingBadge to match watchlist.html's text-xs text-on-surface styling for the rating text. I'm adjusting pill typography for watchlist with text-xs font and label-sm inter for labels, while stars remain text-sm material icons. I'm setting star color to `colors.primary` for poster badges and adjusting spacing to match `spacing.sm` and `spacing.xs`. I'm adjusting badge positioning to `top-2 right-2` with `spacing.sm` (8px) and setting remove button size to `spacing.xxl` (32px). I'm adjusting star display order in PosterRatingBadge to prioritize star over value for search variants, matching search.html pattern. I'm adjusting ContentCard variant defaults to prioritize search behavior for backward compatibility, making watchlist variant explicit only where needed. I'm implementing the header chips with dynamic empty state messages based on active genre name. 

I'm adding dynamic chip components for genre filtering with pressable UI elements. </details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2)**_

Here is what was implemented.

### Star = `text-primary` (`colors.primary`)
- **`PosterRatingBadge`**: star uses **`colors.primary`** for both variants; **watchlist** variant matches `watchlist.html` (**star first**, then score, **`label-sm`** / semibold on the number, **`poster_rating_scrim`**, tighter pill padding).
- **Search** variant stays **score → star** with **`hero-badge`** (`search.html` trending).
- **`ContentCard`** / Search grids pass **`variant="search"`**; **`WatchlistGridCard`** passes **`variant="watchlist"`**.
- **`DetailChipsRow`** star updated to **`primary`** for consistency.

### Filters = only genres that appear on saved titles
- Replaced **`WatchlistMediaFilter`** (`all` / `movie` / `tv`) with **`WatchlistGenreFilter`**: **`'all' | number`** (number = TMDB movie **genre id**).
- **`collectWatchlistGenreChips`** in **`src/utils/watchlistFilters.ts`**: unions **`genreIds`** across **`items`**, keeps ids that resolve in **`movieGenres`**, sorts **A→Z** by label.
- **`WatchlistScreenHeader`**: always an **All** chip, then one chip per collected genre (same idle/selected styles as before).
- **`filterWatchlistItems`**: **`all`** = full list; **`genreId`** = items whose **`genreIds`** include that id.
- **`useWatchlist`**: if the active genre id is no longer on any item, **`filter`** resets to **`'all'`**.
- **`WatchlistScreen`**: passes **`collectionGenreChips`** from **`useMemo`**; **`WatchlistFilterEmpty`** gets **`activeGenreLabel`** for clearer copy.

### Watchlist card ↔ `watchlist.html` / your reference
- **Poster**: **`surface_container_low`** shell, **`radiusCardInner`** (~`rounded-xl` 12px), image/placeholder same radius, **no** inner margin on placeholder (full-bleed like the mock).
- **Rating**: **`PosterRatingBadge`** **`watchlist`** variant (order, type sizes, scrim).
- **Title**: **`title-search-card`** (Manrope **16** / **700**, `on_surface`) — `text-base font-bold` in the HTML.
- **Subtitle**: **`label-sm`**, **`on_surface_variant`** (unchanged token path).
- **Remove**: **32×32** (`spacing.xxl`), **`title-lg`** glyph on **`on_surface`** (closer to `text-lg` ×).
- **Details**: **`title-sm`** semibold **`on_surface`** (`text-sm font-semibold`).
- **Vertical rhythm**: **`gap: spacing.sm`** (`gap-2`).

### Other files
- **`src/api/types.ts`**, **`src/hooks/index.ts`**, **`ProfileScreen`**, **`.cursor/rules/components.mdc`** (rating line), **`__tests__/watchlistFilters.test.ts`** (genre filter + chip collector tests).

All **51** Jest tests pass; **`tsc --noEmit`** is clean.

**Note:** Genre chips use **`/genre/movie/list`**. TV rows whose ids are not in that list won’t get a chip (unchanged limitation unless you add **`/genre/tv/list`** and merge).
